steps.t: Phials of poison can be found on Uruks and Orcs in Cair Andros. You should collect phials of poison.
A workbench can be found at Henneth Annûn. You should bring the phials of poison to Henneth Annûn for study.
A workbench can be found at Henneth Annûn. You should bring the phials of poison to Henneth Annûn for study.
Mílgamel can be found at Henneth Annûn. You should take the poisons and what you have learned to her.
